CustomField.description: Calculated end date. Only consider the dates in study offering if both start/end date in study session are empty.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISNULL( End_Date__c)) || NOT(ISNULL ( Start_Date__c)), End_Date__c, IF( ISNULL( Study_Offering__r.End_Date_Calculated__c) && NOT(ISNULL( Study_Offering__r.Start_Date_Calculated__c)), null, Study_Offering__r.End_Date_Calculated__c ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated end date. Only consider the dates in study offering if both start/end date in study session are empty.
CustomField.label: End Date
